description:
The README config table documents target_branch, min_bl_version, delivery.mode etc. but never mentions master_url, state_remote, or the .balls/master.json pointer file -- the dominant feature of recent work. master_url appears exactly once in the whole README, in passing in the pre-squash-gate section. There is no config-table entry and no federated-deployment section.

Add master_url / state_remote / master.json to the config documentation and give the federated multi-repo model a proper README section, cross-referencing docs/SPEC-federated-state.md. Depends on bl-81e0 so the README can cite the SPEC as the authoritative contract rather than restating it.

Audited 2026-05-20.
title: README: document master_url / federated config
